title: alectryon subdentatus f. genuinus
intro: Alectryon subdentatus f. genuinus, also known as a species of the Alectryon subdentatus plant, is a type of shrub that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alectryon subdentatus f. genuinus include relief from fever, pain, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use.
